headings: Built on precision. Driven by excellence.
What we bring to every engagement
documents.body: LUXIVAL Home Digital Services Tourism & Transport Portfolio QA & Audit About Get Started About Luxival · Helsinki, Finland Built on precision. Driven by excellence. Luxival is a multidisciplinary premium brand uniting luxury finish travel, web development, QA software testing, and agentic workflow design — all under one obsessive standard of quality. Book a consultation Our services Founder & Director · Luxival The founder Olakunle Shopeju "I built Luxival to close the gap between premium airport transport and world-class digital services — because every touchpoint deserves the same obsessive attention to detail." A Senior QA Automation Engineer and software tester with 9+ years of experience across automotive, mobile, embedded, and API-driven environments. ISTQB certified. BEng in Mechanical Engineering. Currently completing IT studies in Helsinki. Based in Vantaa, Finland — serving international travellers, businesses, and digital brands that refuse to compromise. 0 Years of engineering 0 Transfers completed 0 Disciplines mastered 0 Audits delivered Career history Experience that speaks for itself Senior QA Automation Engineer TIER Mobility · Helsinki, Finland E2E test automation, CI/CD integration, mobile QA for electric mobility platform. Software QA Analyst Dana Group · Nigeria Test strategy, functional and regression testing for enterprise software products. Website URL Email address Run Free Audit → Fetching page SEO checks PageSpeed Accessibility Compiling report Audit complete — SEO Fundamentals Score / 10 Free Audit Results ⬇ Download Free PDF Report Report emailed to — Premium audit Go Deeper with the Full 7-Flow Analysis Your free scan covers SEO fundamentals. documents.title: Finland Winter Travel Planning | Helsinki, Uusimaa & Lapland | Luxival
documents.description: Plan Finland winter travel with Luxival: Helsinki airport pickup, Uusimaa city stays, frozen lakes, sauna, Lapland northern lights, and private travel planning.
headings: Make the season work for you
Build your Finland winter travel plan
documents.body: LUXIVAL Home Travel Airport Pickup Lapland Plan Trip Finland winter travel Plan a Finland Winter Trip From Helsinki airport arrival to frozen lakes, sauna, city stays, and optional Lapland northern lights, Luxival helps make winter travel in Finland feel planned, warm, and easy. Start Winter Planning Add airport pickup HEL Arrival support Winter Seasonal planning Lapland Optional extension Helsinki first Begin with airport pickup, hotel transfer, city restaurants, sauna, museums, and winter walks without rushing. Nature and sauna Plan frozen lakes, forest escapes, sauna rituals, and quiet premium stays based on weather and timing. Lapland extension Add northern lights, glass igloos, cabins, and snowy landscapes when the trip length supports it. Suggested winter flow Make the season work for you Finland winter travel is best when logistics, warmth, daylight, and rest are planned together. Arrival day Airport pickup, hotel check-in, easy dinner, and a calm first night. Uusimaa days Helsinki, Vantaa, Espoo, Porvoo, sauna, design, food, and waterfront routes. Nature day Frozen lake or forest escape with private transport and flexible timing. Lapland option Build in aurora evenings and winter lodges if the itinerary allows. FAQ Finland winter travel questions Can Luxival plan a Finland winter trip? Yes. We help organize the route, arrival support, travel rhythm, and service handoff. Can I combine Helsinki and Lapland? Yes. Helsinki and Uusimaa can work as the arrival base before a Lapland extension. Start with your dates Build your Finland winter travel plan Send your dates, travellers, and must-have winter experiences. Start Planning See luxury Lapland Luxival · Uusimaa, Finland · support@luxival.com · +358 50 351 8366

documents.body: LUXIVAL Home Portfolio Services Contact AI-Powered Growth Platform Strategic Growth Auditing & AI-Driven Planning Identify performance bottlenecks, prioritize high-ROI technical fixes, and execute growth strategies with confidence. AI-powered growth auditing that turns insights into measurable results. 🎯 Performance Analysis 📊 Data-Driven Prioritization ✅ Actionable Roadmaps 📈 Growth Intelligence Launch Auditor → Get Consultation Backend Operations Why It Matters Growth Auditing Reimagined Every business has untapped growth potential. But where do you start? GROWTH_ARCHITECT analyzes your entire digital presence—technical SEO, conversion funnel, performance metrics—and generates prioritized action plans that drive measurable results. 🔍 Technical SEO Audit Canonical URLs, structured data, core web vitals, crawlability issues, and indexation problems identified automatically. 📈 Conversion Analysis Funnel optimization, form friction, CTA effectiveness, and user experience barriers that block revenue. ⚡ Performance Bottlenecks PageSpeed insights, CLS, LCP, INP, image optimization, and frontend performance scoring with fixes. 🤖 AI-Powered Insights Machine learning identifies patterns across your data. Strategic recommendations ranked by ROI impact. 🎯 Execution Roadmap Implementation-ready action plan with priorities, effort estimates, and expected growth impact for each initiative. 📊 Growth Tracking Monitor implementation progress, track KPIs, and measure ROI from each completed initiative over time. Who It's For Built for Growth Leaders 🚀 Marketing Directors Get clear visibility into technical barriers blocking organic growth. documents.title: GROWTH_ARCHITECT Backend Operations | Luxival
documents.description: Backend operations page for the GROWTH_ARCHITECT portfolio project. Shows the live proxy flow, service status, and runtime details.
headings: The whole operation, in one live view.
Request flow from browser to model and back
The same app experience users launch from the portfolio
Publish the portfolio entry and keep the backend visible
documents.body: LUXIVAL Home Portfolio Growth Architect Contact Backend Operations · Growth Architect The whole operation, in one live view. This page shows how the GROWTH_ARCHITECT app runs: the frontend launch surface, the proxy backend that handles AI requests, and the runtime status used in local and deployed environments. View status Open app Portfolio entry Frontend Portfolio dist build /portfolio/growth-architect/frontend/dist/ Backend Checking health... Waiting for /health response Proxy path POST /api-proxy Also supports websocket relay via /ws-proxy Runtime Google ADC + Vertex AI Requires GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT and GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION How It Operates Request flow from browser to model and back 1. Input The user enters a URL in the GROWTH_ARCHITECT interface and starts an audit. 2. Frontend The app sends the request to the proxy endpoint rather than calling Google APIs directly from the browser. 3. Backend The Node backend authenticates with Google ADC, builds the Vertex AI request, and forwards the payload. 4. Response The result comes back to the interface, where the app renders the score, recommendations, and follow-up actions. Live Preview The same app experience users launch from the portfolio The frame below points at the production-style build so you can show the app and the operational shell in one place. growth-architect.luxival.com Backend files The proxy server lives in the Growth Architect backend service and now exposes a health endpoint for the ops page. Express ws Rate limit ADC auth What this page is for Use it as the portfolio-friendly operations view: it shows the running app, the proxy route, and whether the backend responds to health checks. Portfolio Operations Live status Ready to deploy Publish the portfolio entry and keep the backend visible Once deploy

The page calculates every pattern piece to your body. Pay once — receive a printable PDF your tailor can use to cut and construct your suit. €29 One-time · Yours forever Custom-calculated to your measurements Start My Pattern → How It Works 🧥 Replace with your model photo Edit src on line ~330 of this file Front Left profile Back Three-quarter See It In Detail Watch the suit come together See how the three-piece suit fits, moves, and drapes. Every seam, pocket, and lapel is documented in the pattern you will receive. The pattern includes full step-by-step construction instructions — written for beginners. No tailoring experience required to follow along. ✦ 32 fully-dimensioned pattern pieces ✦ 64 sequential construction steps ✦ 5 sizes EU 38–52 grading included ✦ Printable 1:1 scale — no rescaling needed Classic Navy Three-Piece Suit · Luxival Pattern Studio What's Included Everything your tailor needs, delivered to your inbox 📐 Custom-Calculated Pattern Every piece recalculated from your body measurements. Not a standard size — your exact proportions. 🖨 Printable 1:1 Scale PDF Tiled across A4 pages. Print, tape together, and cut directly. No rescaling, no guesswork. ✂️ Cutting Sheets All 32 pieces with seam allowances, grain lines, corner angles, and notch marks clearly shown. 📖 Construction Guide 64-step beginner-friendly guide. Covers canvas, lapels, sleeves, trousers, and waistcoat construction. 🗂 Quick Reference Card All 64 steps on one printed page. Pin above your sewing machine and follow in order. 📏 Grading Chart Size adjustment tables for EU 38–52 a

documents.body: LUXIVAL Travel Services Portfolio Platform Platform Blog About Book a consultation Luxival Platform · Software Projects Two tools. Built to perform. Vault Ledger is a full-stack AI financial tool — upload receipts or invoices and Gemini OCR extracts every line automatically. Categorise expenses, generate branded PDF invoices, sync with Google Drive, and collect payments via Stripe, all from one dashboard. React 18 TypeScript Gemini AI Vite Firebase Google Drive API jsPDF 🧾 Gemini OCR Upload photo or PDF — AI extracts vendor, date, VAT, and amount with no manual input. 📂 Expense Ledger Filter by date, category, or status. Sort and export a PDF report in one click. 📄 Invoice Generator Select verified expenses, set a tax rate, and generate a branded client invoice instantly. ☁️ Google Drive Sync Connect your Drive to pull receipts directly from the cloud into the expense pipeline. 📊 Financial Statements Generate a master PDF statement covering all revenue, expenses, and VAT for any period. How Vault Ledger works Ingest Upload receipts or PDFs from your device, or pull files directly from Google Drive. documents.title: Finland New Business Harvester & Dashboard | Portfolio
documents.description: Full-stack Next.js portfolio component harvesting new businesses (Oy & Toiminimi) registered daily in Finland, storing them in Google Sheets, and presenting an enriched filterable dashboard.
documents.body: Agentic Ingestion Pipeline Finland New Business Harvester A full-stack, serverless pipeline executing every 24 hours. Harvests newly registered corporations (Oy) via the PRH Open Data API and scrapes sole traders (Toiminimi) via the PRH Virre search engine, deduplicates records, stores them in Google Sheets, and enriches listings with LinkedIn and Domain search shortcuts. Next.js 15 (App Router) Google Sheets & Drive APIs Playwright Browser Scraping PRH Open Data API v3 Tailwind CSS v4 1. Harvesting Routine Running every 24 hours via a Vercel Cron/Scheduled Function, the server-side API queries Oy registrations from the PRH API and spins up Playwright to navigate the Virre service to extract Toiminimi registrations, which are generally omitted from open APIs. API Endpoint: /api/cron/harvest 2. Google Sheets Database Connects directly to your workspace using secure service account credentials. The pipeline automatically locates or creates a sheet named "NewBusinesses" , reads existing keys to prevent duplicates, and appends the cleansed rows. Spreadsheet Name: NewBusinesses 3. Dynamic Enrichment Every business is automatically mapped to calculate specific search shortcuts: a Google Search for the founders/leadership on LinkedIn, and a search to discover their business domains, making outreach and verification immediate. Actions: LinkedIn Finder, Domain Discovery Registered Businesses Directory Live interactive data table querying rows directly from the Google Sheets database. Currently displaying records loaded dynamically. luxival.com/portfolio/new-businesses/embed Retrieving business directory... Embedding in Luxival Website This Next.js dashboard is built specifically to be embedded anywhere on your portfolio or website as a responsive iframe. The dedicated /embed rou

documents.title: Privacy Policy | Luxival
documents.description: Luxival privacy policy — how we collect, use and protect your personal data in compliance with GDPR and Finnish law.
headings: 2. What data we collect and why
4. How long we keep your data
documents.body: LUXIVAL Travel Pattern Portfolio QA Platform Platform Blog About Book a consultation Legal Privacy Policy Last updated: 11 June 2026  ·  Applies to luxival.com This policy explains what personal data Luxival collects, why, how long it is kept, and your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Finnish data protection law. 1. Data controller The data controller is: Luxival Operated by Olakunle Oluwarotimi Shopeju Varikkokaarre 7A 40, 01700 Kivistö, Finland Email: support@luxival.com 2. What data we collect and why Contact and project enquiries When you submit the contact form we collect your name, email address, optional phone number, company name, and your message. We use this data solely to respond to your enquiry and, if applicable, to fulfil a service contract. Legal basis: Legitimate interest (responding to your direct enquiry) and, where a contract follows, performance of that contract. Airport transfer bookings When you book a ride we collect your name, email, phone number, pickup address, destination, preferred date and time, and flight details. We use this to organise and deliver the transport service you requested. Legal basis: Performance of a contract. Newsletter subscriptions If you subscribe to the Luxival newsletter we collect your email address and, optionally, your name. You may unsubscribe at any time via the link in any newsletter email. Legal basis: Consent. Website analytics We do not currently use third-party analytics or advertising trackers. We may in future use a privacy-respecting analytics tool (such as Plausible or Fathom) and will update this policy if we do. 3. Data storage and processors Form submissions and booking data are stored in Supabase, a PostgreSQL-based platform operated by Supabase Inc., whose servers are loc

Garment type Shirt / Blouse Trousers / Pants Dress Jacket / Blazer Skirt Fit preference Fitted (0–2 cm ease) Regular (3–5 cm ease) Relaxed (6–10 cm ease) Bust / Chest (cm) Waist (cm) Hip (cm) Height (cm) Shoulder width (cm) Sleeve length (cm) Generate Pattern Measurements Your pattern measurements These are cutting measurements including ease allowance. Add seam allowance (typically 1.5 cm) before cutting fabric. By submitting an enquiry or booking a service, you agree to these terms. 1. About Luxival Luxival is a service business operated by Olakunle Oluwarotimi Shopeju, registered and operating in Finland. We offer premium airport transfer services and digital professional services including software QA, web design, AI agent development, and engineering design. 2. Use of this website This website is provided for information and to enable service bookings and enquiries. You may not: Use the site for any unlawful purpose or in violation of Finnish or EU law. Attempt to access, probe, or disrupt systems beyond the public interface. Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent enquiries or bookings. Reproduce or redistribute site content without written permission. 3. Airport transfer service Booking and confirmation A booking is confirmed only after you receive a written confirmation from Luxival by email or WhatsApp. Submitting a booking form does not itself constitute a confirmed reservation. Cancellations Cancellations made more than 24 hours before the scheduled pickup: no charge. Cancellations made 4 to 24 hours before pickup: 50% of the agreed fare. Cancellations made less than 4 hours before pickup, or no-shows: full fare applies. Flight tracking and delays We monitor incoming flight status in real time. If your flight is delayed, we adjust the pickup time at no extra charge. We are not liable for delays caused by factors outside our control (traffic, severe weather, road closures). A complete picture of how your site performs — and exactly what to fix. 01 Technical Scan Core Web Vitals, broken links, crawl errors, HTTPS, and mobile performance. 02 SEO & Content On-page SEO, title/meta quality, keyword gaps, and backlink profile snapshot. 03 UX & Conversion Funnel analysis, CTA placement, form friction, and mobile UX score. Planning a trip to Helsinki? documents.title: Ubuntu Google Cloud VM Setup | Web Infrastructure Help | Luxival
documents.description: Need help with an Ubuntu Google Cloud VM? Luxival supports setup, hardening, deployment, QA checks, monitoring basics, and web infrastructure troubleshooting.
headings: Ubuntu Google Cloud VM Setup Help
A cloud VM should be understandable, recoverable, and ready to serve users
Get your Ubuntu VM checked before users depend on it
documents.body: LUXIVAL Home Digital QA Audit Get Help Ubuntu - Google Cloud VM Ubuntu Google Cloud VM Setup Help Need a reliable Linux server for a website, app, API, automation, or test environment? Luxival supports Ubuntu VM setup, deployment checks, basic security, and QA-minded troubleshooting on Google Cloud. Request VM Help Audit a site $ gcloud compute instances create luxival-app + Ubuntu LTS + firewall rules + nginx / app runtime + SSL readiness + deployment QA checks Setup Ubuntu VM basics, SSH access, firewall direction, runtime planning, domain routing, and deployment readiness. Hardening Practical security checks: updates, least privilege, ports, service exposure, SSL, and backup thinking. QA review Smoke checks, redirect checks, uptime basics, deployment validation, and user-facing issue review. What we check A cloud VM should be understandable, recoverable, and ready to serve users Luxival combines infrastructure support with QA thinking, so the server is not only running but easier to trust. Ubuntu version and package updates SSH access and firewall exposure Nginx, app runtime, or reverse proxy flow Domain, SSL, redirects, and basic monitoring Deployment smoke test and rollback notes FAQ Ubuntu Google Cloud VM questions Can Luxival help with an Ubuntu Google Cloud VM? Yes. We can help with setup, deployment checks, basic hardening, troubleshooting, and QA review. Is this only for Google Cloud? The page focuses on Google Cloud, but the same Linux deployment thinking applies to many VPS and cloud providers. Need infrastructure help? Get your Ubuntu VM checked before users depend on it Send the app goal, current issue, domain, stack, and what you want deployed. Request Help View digital services Luxival Digital - Uusimaa, Finland - support@luxival.com

documents.title: User Data Deletion | Luxival
documents.description: Request deletion of personal data submitted to Luxival through contact, booking, newsletter, or creator forms.
documents.body: LUXIVAL Digital Services Tourism & Transport Portfolio QA Blog About Contact Privacy User Data Deletion Applies to luxival.com and Luxival connected apps Use this page to request deletion of personal data you submitted through Luxival contact, newsletter, booking, and creator forms. We process matching records by email address immediately where deletion is allowed. Deletion callback received Your app data deletion request was received. Confirmation code: Request deletion Enter the same email address you used with Luxival. Contact enquiries, newsletter subscriptions, and creator applications are deleted. Ride requests are anonymized so personal identifiers are removed while limited service records can be retained for legal and accounting obligations. Email address Confirm email address Optional note Delete my data Manual request You can also email support@luxival.com with the subject "Data deletion request". We may ask for extra information only when needed to verify ownership of the email address or comply with Finnish legal obligations. Luxival © 2026 · Helsinki, Finland Home Privacy Policy Terms of Service Data Deletion Contact
